title: Hello, Biomes!
description: A mod that adds new biomes and features to your Minecraft experience.
body: In this mod, take control of your Minecraft world with new biomes, plants, and blocks! Protect your gardens from mobs using the electric fence, or grab some green wood in the sycamore forest! Whatever you need for materials, this mod either has it or will. Download Hello, Biomes!, today!
